checkin.journal: Amitriptyline rebound day 2. Paused amitriptyline after 11 days as experiment. 36h off: severe ischial tuberosity pain, hip pain, perineal pain, groin achilles. Worst flare in years. Woke at 2am unable to sleep in any position. Pain consistent with central sensitization rebound - body was recalibrating downward on the drug, withdrawal caused overcorrection. Also stopped Telfast and Vitamin C simultaneously which removed entire histamine defense. Plan: restart Telfast+VitC+Enterosgel today, infra
checkin.journal_summary: Severe amitriptyline rebound pain day 2. Ischial, hip, perineal flare. 4h sleep. Restarting histamine stack, IR sauna planned. Confirms central sensitization mechanism.
